noHousehold.heading: Welcome to Jolly Home
noHousehold.body: Create your household to get started, or join one with an invite link.

solo.heading: You're flying solo
solo.body: Invite roommates or family to unlock shared features. Until then, explore with demo data.

sandbox.banner: You're viewing demo data. Clear it anytime when you're ready to go live.

error.authFailure: Incorrect email or password. Please try again or reset your password.
error.network: Connection problem. Check your internet and try again.
error.inviteExpired: This invite has expired. Ask your household admin to send a new one.
error.inviteUsed: This invite link has already been used. Ask your household admin for a new one.
error.memberLimit: Households are limited to 6 members on the free plan. Upgrade to Plus to add more.
error.emailNotVerified: Check your inbox — we sent a verification email. Didn't get it? Resend below.

leaveHousehold.confirmation: Are you sure you want to leave? Your expense history stays on record. Any outstanding balances will remain visible to other members.

removeMember.confirmation: This will remove {{name}} from the household. Their expense history will remain. Any outstanding balances will stay on record.

deleteAccount.confirmation: Deleting your account is permanent. You can choose immediate deletion or a 30-day grace period.

credits.warning90: You've used 90% of your AI credits this month. Purchase more or upgrade your plan.
credits.warning100: You've used all your AI credits. Add more credits to continue using AI features.

card1.heading: Your household, organized
card1.body: Track money, chores, meals, and more — all in one place your whole household actually uses.

card2.heading: Invite anyone in seconds
card2.body: Share a link, QR code, or email. No app required to preview — they can join from any device.

card3.heading: Jolly keeps it fair
card3.body: Your AI housemate helps balance chores, suggest meals, and track who owes what — so nobody keeps score.
